```{r}
        p_value = round(p_value, 4)
      )

    kable(
      moran_ols_tbl,
      caption = "Test de Moran sur residus OLS (variable cible: points accessibles en zone primaire)"
    )

    iris_res <- iris_zone_etude
    iris_res$ols_res <- NA_real_
    iris_res$ols_res[complete_idx] <- stats::resid(ols_mod)

    ggplot() +
      geom_sf(data = iris_res, aes(fill = ols_res), color = "white", linewidth = 0.25) +
      scale_fill_gradient2(
        low = "#2C7BB6",
        mid = "white",
        high = "#D7191C",
        midpoint = 0,
        na.value = "grey90",
        name = "Residus OLS"
      ) +
      labs(
        title = "Carte des residus OLS (accessibilite primaire)",
        subtitle = "Detection visuelle de structure spatiale residuelle"
      ) +
      theme_minimal()
  }
}

```

Row {data-height=300}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Commentaire d’analyse

Cette carte vérifie si l'information spatiale reste présente après OLS. Si des grappes de résidus persistent, cela valide l'idée du cours selon laquelle le choix du modèle (et des hypothèses) change l'interprétation économique : il faut passer à des spécifications spatiales (SAR/SEM) pour ne pas biaiser les conclusions concurrentielles.


### Specification et estimation SAR/SEM

```{r}
if (!spdep_ok || !exists("model_cc") || !exists("ols_mod") || !exists("W_rook_cc")) {
  info_tbl <- data.frame(
    etat = "Modeles SAR/SEM non estimes",
    raison = "Prerequis indisponibles (spdep ou modele OLS non construit)."
  )
  kable(info_tbl, caption = "Etat de la Partie 7.4")
} else {
  lm_tests_obj <- tryCatch({
    if ("lm.LMtests" %in% getNamespaceExports("spdep")) {
      spdep::lm.LMtests(ols_mod, W_rook_cc, test = c("RLMerr", "RLMlag"), zero.policy = TRUE)
    } else if ("lm.RStests" %in% getNamespaceExports("spdep")) {
      spdep::lm.RStests(ols_mod, W_rook_cc, test = c("adjRSerr", "adjRSlag"), zero.policy = TRUE)
    } else {
      NULL
    }
  }, error = function(e) NULL)

  get_test_stat <- function(obj, nm) {
    if (is.null(obj) || is.null(obj[[nm]])) return(c(stat = NA_real_, p = NA_real_))
    c(
      stat = as.numeric(obj[[nm]]$statistic[[1]]),
      p = as.numeric(obj[[nm]]$p.value)
    )
  }

  rlm_err <- get_test_stat(lm_tests_obj, "RLMerr")
  rlm_lag <- get_test_stat(lm_tests_obj, "RLMlag")
  if (all(is.na(rlm_err))) rlm_err <- get_test_stat(lm_tests_obj, "adjRSerr")
  if (all(is.na(rlm_lag))) rlm_lag <- get_test_stat(lm_tests_obj, "adjRSlag")

  tests_tbl <- data.frame(
    test = c("Robust LM Error", "Robust LM Lag"),
    statistic = round(c(rlm_err["stat"], rlm_lag["stat"]), 4),
    p_value = round(c(rlm_err["p"], rlm_lag["p"]), 4)
  )
  kable(tests_tbl, caption = "Tests robustes de specification spatiale (Rook)")

  if (spatialreg_ok) {
    sar_mod <- tryCatch(
      spatialreg::lagsarlm(formula(ols_mod), data = model_cc, listw = W_rook_cc, zero.policy = TRUE),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    sem_mod <- tryCatch(
      spatialreg::errorsarlm(formula(ols_mod), data = model_cc, listw = W_rook_cc, zero.policy = TRUE),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    synth_mod <- data.frame(
      modele = c("OLS", "SAR", "SEM"),
      AIC = c(
        tryCatch(AIC(ols_mod), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        tryCatch(AIC(sar_mod), error = function(e) NA_real_),
        tryCatch(AIC(sem_mod), error = function(e) NA_real_)
      ),
      param_spatial = c(
        NA_real_,
        if (!is.null(sar_mod)) as.numeric(sar_mod$rho) else NA_real_,
        if (!is.null(sem_mod)) as.numeric(sem_mod$lambda) else NA_real_
      ),
      note = c(
        "",
        if (!is.null(sar_mod)) "" else "SAR non convergent",
        if (!is.null(sem_mod)) "" else "SEM non convergent"
      )
    ) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        AIC = round(AIC, 2),
        param_spatial = round(param_spatial, 4)
      )
  } else {
    synth_mod <- data.frame(
      modele = c("OLS", "SAR", "SEM"),
      AIC = c(round(tryCatch(AIC(ols_mod), error = function(e) NA_real_), 2), NA_real_, NA_real_),
      param_spatial = c(NA_real_, NA_real_, NA_real_),
      note = c(
        "",
        "Package spatialreg absent",
        "Package spatialreg absent"
      )
    )
  }

  kable(
    synth_mod,
    caption = "Comparaison OLS/SAR/SEM (AIC et parametre spatial)"
  )
}
```

PARTIE 9: Top 4 zones preferables pour une nouvelle implantation
=======================================================================

Row {data-height=1000}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Top 4 zones candidates {data-width=42}

```{r}
if (!exists("iris_zone_etude")) {
  kable(data.frame(etat = "iris_zone_etude introuvable"), caption = "Top 4 non disponible")
} else {
  # Base de scoring: toutes les features socio-demo + acces/couverture construites avant.
  cols_scoring <- intersect(
    c(
      "1er_quartile_euro", "Mediane_euro", "3e_quartile_euro",
      "Pct_actifs", "Pct_Cadres_sup", "Pct_Menages_enfants", "Pct_Menages_voiture",
      "Densite_pop", "Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture", "couverture_pct", "Nb_supermarches"
    ),
    names(iris_zone_etude)
  )

  candidats <- iris_zone_etude %>%
    st_drop_geometry() %>%
    dplyr::select(iris_name, com_name, dplyr::all_of(cols_scoring)) %>%
    group_by(iris_name, com_name) %>%
    summarise(
      across(
        everything(),
        ~ {
          x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.x))
          if (all(is.na(x))) NA_real_ else mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
        }
      ),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  minmax01 <- function(x) {
    x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
    r <- range(x, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (!is.finite(r[1]) || !is.finite(r[2]) || r[1] == r[2]) return(rep(0.5, length(x)))
    (x - r[1]) / (r[2] - r[1])
  }

  row_weighted_mean <- function(df, cols, w) {
    m <- as.matrix(df[, cols, drop = FALSE])
    apply(m, 1, function(v) {
      ok <- is.finite(v)
      if (!any(ok)) return(NA_real_)
      sum(v[ok] * w[ok]) / sum(w[ok])
    })
  }

  candidats <- candidats %>%
    mutate(
      s_q1 = minmax01(`1er_quartile_euro`),
      s_mediane = minmax01(Mediane_euro),
      s_q3 = minmax01(`3e_quartile_euro`),
      s_actifs = minmax01(Pct_actifs),
      s_cadres = minmax01(Pct_Cadres_sup),
      s_familles = minmax01(Pct_Menages_enfants),
      s_voiture = minmax01(Pct_Menages_voiture),
      s_densite = minmax01(log1p(Densite_pop)),
      s_faible_concurrence_car = 1 - minmax01(Nb_pdv_access_primaire_voiture),
      s_sous_couverture = 1 - minmax01(couverture_pct),
      s_faible_concurrence_pieton = if ("Nb_supermarches" %in% names(candidats)) 1 - minmax01(Nb_supermarches) else NA_real_
    )

  # Sous-scores interpretable
  candidats <- candidats %>%
    mutate(
      score_revenu = row_weighted_mean(cur_data(), c("s_q1", "s_mediane", "s_q3"), c(0.30, 0.45, 0.25)),
      score_dynamisme = row_weighted_mean(cur_data(), c("s_actifs", "s_cadres"), c(0.55, 0.45)),
      score_structure_menages = row_weighted_mean(cur_data(), c("s_familles", "s_voiture"), c(0.45, 0.55)),
      score_demande = row_weighted_mean(
        cur_data(),
        c("score_revenu", "score_dynamisme", "score_structure_menages", "s_densite"),
        c(0.32, 0.22, 0.20, 0.26)
      ),
      score_offre_insuffisante = row_weighted_mean(
        cur_data(),
        c("s_faible_concurrence_car", "s_sous_couverture", "s_faible_concurrence_pieton"),
        c(0.50, 0.35, 0.15)
      ),
      score_total = 0.60 * score_demande + 0.40 * score_offre_insuffisante
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      pts_revenu = round(score_revenu * 100, 1),
      pts_dynamisme = round(score_dynamisme * 100, 1),
      pts_menages = round(score_structure_menages * 100, 1),
      pts_densite = round(s_densite * 100, 1),
      pts_faible_concurrence = round(s_faible_concurrence_car * 100, 1),
      pts_sous_couverture = round(s_sous_couverture * 100, 1),
      pts_demande = round(score_demande * 100, 1),
      pts_offre_insuffisante = round(score_offre_insuffisante * 100, 1),
      score_total_100 = round(score_total * 100, 1)
    )

  top4_implantation <- candidats %>%
    arrange(desc(score_total), iris_name) %>%
    slice_head(n = 4) %>%
    mutate(rang = row_number()) %>%
    dplyr::select(
      rang,
      iris_name,
      com_name,
      pts_revenu,
      pts_dynamisme,
      pts_menages,
      pts_densite,
      pts_demande,
      pts_faible_concurrence,
      pts_sous_couverture,
      pts_offre_insuffisante,
      score_total_100
    )

  if (requireNamespace("DT", quietly = TRUE)) {
    DT::datatable(
      top4_implantation,
      rownames = FALSE,
      caption = htmltools::tags$caption(
        style = "caption-side: top; text-align: left;",
        "Top 4 des zones preferables (scoring multicritere)"
      ),
      options = list(
        dom = "t",
        paging = FALSE,
        searching = FALSE,
        info = FALSE,
        scrollX = TRUE,
        autoWidth = TRUE
      ),
      class = "compact stripe",
      width = "100%"
    )
  } else {
    kable(
      top4_implantation,
      format = "html",
      caption = "Top 4 des zones preferables (scoring multicritere)"
    ) %>%
      kable_styling(full_width = TRUE, position = "left") %>%
      column_spec(1:ncol(top4_implantation), width = "120px") %>%
      scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "520px")
  }
}
```

### Carte des 4 zones prioritaires {data-width=58}

```{r}
if (!exists("top4_implantation") || nrow(top4_implantation) == 0) {
  plot.new()
  title("Top 4 indisponible")
} else {
  top4_join <- top4_implantation %>%
    dplyr::select(iris_name, rang, score_total_100)

  iris_top4_map <- iris_zone_etude %>%
    left_join(top4_join, by = "iris_name") %>%
    mutate(
      zone_top4 = ifelse(is.na(rang), "Autres zones", paste0("Top ", rang)),
      zone_top4 = factor(zone_top4, levels = c("Top 1", "Top 2", "Top 3", "Top 4", "Autres zones")),
      label_top4 = ifelse(is.na(rang), NA_character_, paste0("Top ", rang, " - ", iris_name))
    )

  tm_shape(iris_top4_map %>% filter(zone_top4 == "Autres zones")) +
    tm_polygons(
      col = "grey85",
      border.col = "white",
      lwd = 0.3,
      alpha = 0.9,
      title = "",
      legend.show = FALSE
    ) +
    tm_shape(iris_top4_map %>% filter(zone_top4 != "Autres zones")) +
    tm_polygons(
      col = "zone_top4",
      palette = c("#005F73", "#0A9396", "#94D2BD", "#E9D8A6"),
      style = "cat",
      border.col = "white",
      lwd = 0.6,
      alpha = 0.95,
      title = "Classement"
    ) +
    tm_text(
      text = "label_top4",
      size = 0.7,
      col = "black",
      bg.color = "white",
      bg.alpha = 0.7
    ) +
    tm_layout(
      title = "Top 4 des zones d'implantation preferables",
      legend.outside = TRUE
    )
}
```

Row {data-height=300}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Commentaire d’analyse

```{r, results='asis'}
if (exists("top4_implantation") && nrow(top4_implantation) > 0) {
  cat(
    "- Cette synthèse respecte les règles du cours (p.30-32) : cadre explicite, indicateurs tracés et décision multicritère plutôt qu'un seul signal.\n",
    "- Les zones retenues combinent potentiel de demande (revenus, actifs, structure des ménages, densité) et insuffisance relative d'offre (accessibilité/couverture/concurrence).\n",
    "- Top 4 retenu : ", paste(top4_implantation$iris_name, collapse = " ; "), ".\n",
    sep = ""
  )
}
```
